description: A WebSocket subscription that broadcasts Protect events

children.name: modelKey
children.description: The model key of the event

children.name: start
children.description: Unix timestamp of the start time of the event.

children.name: end
children.description: Unix timestamp of the end time of the event.

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/protect/integration/v1/subscribe/events", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get Protect event messages
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/subscribe/events"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/protect/integration/v1/subscribe/events", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get Protect event messages
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.protect:
    path: "/v1/subscribe/events"
    method: GET
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
